title: "Get key info"
description: "Returns information about keys. (KeyData, Screenshots, Translation in specified language)If key is not found, it's not included in the response."

api:

  children={"Get key info"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v2/projects/{projectId}/keys/info"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns information about keys. (KeyData, Screenshots, Translation in specified language)If key is not found, it's not included in the response.
